privileged_info_summary: Completed PI audit for bcwebcam_env index_bates_itf_barcode task by confirming that the expected target directory (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\LegalCase) and original filename (evidence_document.pdf) match the explicit instructions provided in the prompt.
